programs.title: Sophie's Choice
programs.desc: A writer (Peter MacNicol) meets an Auschwitz survivor (Meryl Streep) and her lover (Kevin Kline).

programs.title: Elegy
programs.desc: A beautiful student (Penélope Cruz) awakens feelings of sexual possessiveness in an aging professor.

programs.title: Clementine
programs.desc: Reeling from the end of a same-sex relationship, Karen seeks refuge in her ex's lake house.

programs.title: The BeastMaster
programs.desc: A psychic (Marc Singer) saves a slave girl (Tanya Roberts) from a sorcerer (Rip Torn).

programs.title: The Dark Crystal
programs.desc: Elfin Gelflings must heal the Dark Crystal to defeat the reptile Skeksis. Performed by Muppets.

programs.title: Labyrinth
programs.desc: Teen (Jennifer Connelly) tries to save baby brother (Toby Froud) from goblin king (David Bowie).
